known_limits: no DDS orientation claim until TMUF smoke

no material gloss claim from Diffuse alpha until TMUF smoke
generated panel names provide token evidence only

notes: belongs behind the CH_2026 full-car proof gate
does not prove tyre sidewall, tread, hub material, or stock wheel routing
optional underglow/shadow route only after CH_2026 full-car proof
custom GBX and no-mudguard work cannot be used in the stock generator

cockpit_mid_deck.description: Top body quadrants, cockpit-adjacent deck fields, large flank panels, and pilot harmony.

target_entries.design_role: large base fields, hard-edge blocks, long stripe clipping, and broad abstract panels
proof_notes: local atlas labels are proven; TMUF runtime visibility still requires calibration smoke
target_entries.symmetry_policy: paired TL/TR/BL/BR named atlas zones; runtime left/right interpretation pending smoke

target_entries.design_role: cockpit-adjacent deck panels, roof flow breaks, and mid-body geometric blocks
proof_notes: large local segmentation evidence; no exact cockpit seam claim until visual review
target_entries.symmetry_policy: generated mid/deck token zones; cockpit/deck reading pending TMUF smoke

target_entries.design_role: large mid-side field for readable speed blades and blank sponsor-like geometry without text
proof_notes: broad area is useful for preview composition; TMUF side wrap remains smoke-pending
target_entries.symmetry_policy: single broad generated mid/side token zone; side split remains GBuffer-dependent

target_entries.design_role: mid-floor support blocks, lower shadow fields, and underside accent probes
proof_notes: support material only before TMUF screenshot acceptance
target_entries.symmetry_policy: generated mid/floor token zones; floor visibility remains unproven

target_entries.design_role: driver color harmony and restrained glass/visor shading
geometry_constraints: named PSD helmet and glass zones only
proof_notes: helmet is visible local atlas evidence but should not drive main car identity
target_entries.symmetry_policy: paired helmet/glass quadrants; keep subordinate to car-body symmetry

target_entries.design_role: small vent interior accent and dark technical inset
geometry_constraints: named PSD side vent zone only
proof_notes: small area atlas evidence only; not a proof of visible vent depth in TMUF
target_entries.symmetry_policy: single named vent zone; use as restrained accent until visibility is accepted

front_nose_centerline.description: Front identity, nose flow, splitter-like support panels, and centerline probes.

target_entries.design_role: front identity wedge, spear tip, and number-free badge field
proof_notes: local NosePart label is proven; front direction confirmation still belongs to smoke calibration
target_entries.symmetry_policy: single named nose zone; use centered graphics unless TMUF review accepts asymmetry

target_entries.design_role: long center stripe, symmetry probe, and top-flow alignment
proof_notes: GBuffer centerline placement remains experimental until TMUF smoke
target_entries.symmetry_policy: GBuffer LAT/X center symmetry; experimental until calibration smoke

target_entries.design_role: front deck blocks, wedge clipping, and large nose-adjacent color surfaces
geometry_constraints: high LEN/Z front placement remains experimental
proof_notes: generated panel tokens are local segmentation evidence, not stock semantic truth
target_entries.symmetry_policy: generated nose/deck token zones; use mirrored/centered graphics until TMUF smoke

target_entries.design_role: front floor returns, lower wedge continuation, and dark/bright underside split probes
proof_notes: use for probe and support fields; exact TMUF visibility remains smoke-pending
target_entries.symmetry_policy: generated nose/floor token zones; not a runtime underside visibility claim

target_entries.design_role: front side sweeps and large lower-side color returns
proof_notes: broad atlas areas support large graphics; exact side wrapping remains unproven
target_entries.symmetry_policy: generated nose/side token zones; side interpretation pending smoke

target_entries.design_role: small aero flicks and secondary color hits
geometry_constraints: named PSD side wing zones only
proof_notes: local labels are proven; visibility and seam quality still require TMUF review
target_entries.symmetry_policy: named side wing and underside labels; use balanced accent colors until TMUF review

target_entries.design_role: front guard caps, edge highlights, and calibration-visible color checks
proof_notes: LEN/Z front split remains experimental until TMUF smoke
target_entries.symmetry_policy: named front guard group; front split by LEN/Z remains experimental

target_entries.design_role: front guard pinstripe edge, underside fill, and inner accent details
geometry_constraints: named PSD front mudguard detail zones only
proof_notes: front detail labels are proven atlas evidence; in-game seam quality remains unproven
target_entries.symmetry_policy: front guard named detail zones; keep paired with cap colors until visual review

rear_engine_tail.description: Rear deck, louver rows, tailwing bands, rear guard rhythm, and lower rear support panels.

target_entries.design_role: rear deck louvers, glow blocks, technical vent rhythm, and symmetric rear highlights
proof_notes: generated panel names support only deck/rear token evidence
exact TMUF visual interpretation and louver placement remain experimental until smoke
target_entries.symmetry_policy: generated rear/deck token zones plus LAT/X mirrored offset bands; runtime symmetry unproven

target_entries.design_role: fine rear deck louver rows, paired glow blocks, and technical vent rhythm

target_entries.design_role: rear floor shadows, dark support fields, and low rear accent returns

target_entries.symmetry_policy: generated rear/floor token zones; lower visibility pending TMUF smoke

target_entries.design_role: rear wing bands, edge trim, and high-contrast rear identity

target_entries.symmetry_policy: paired L/R tailwing labels plus under-border zone; keep bands mirrored until review

target_entries.design_role: rear guard caps, rear color echo, and wheel-arch rhythm
proof_notes: LEN/Z rear split remains experimental until TMUF smoke
target_entries.symmetry_policy: named rear guard group; rear split by LEN/Z remains experimental

target_entries.design_role: rear guard pinstripe edge, tip highlight, and underside fill
